case_number: Constitutional Petition is dismissed for non-

chunks.text: ORDER SHEET I N T HE HI G H CO U R T O F S I N DH B E N C H AT S U K K U R C. P No. D – 1692 of 2024 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge For non-prosecution 02-10-2025 On 18-09-2025, the following order was passed;- “None present for the Petitioner nor any intimation received. Same was the position on the last date of hearing. Perusal of the record reflects that on the last date of hearing matter was adjourned with direction to the office to issue intimation notice to the Counsel for the Petitioner. As an indulgence, matter is adjourned to 02-10-2025. office is directed to repeat intimation notice to the Counsel for the Petitioner for the said date.” Despite intimation notice to the Counsel for the Petitioner, nobody has turned up to pursue this Petition, which is pending without any useful progress. The deliberate absence on the part of the Petitioner and his Counsel prima facie suggests either the purpose of filing instant Petition has been served or they have lost interest in pursuing the same. Accordingly, the instant Constitutional Petition is dismissed for non- prosecution. Judge Judge ARBROHI/PS
